conversation.text: heyyy, just saw your site, looks sick
Cheers, appreciate that. Was this regarding your events company?
yeah we do corporate events, conferences, that sort of thing
Nice. Big space to be in. Are you generating leads at the moment or is it more word of mouth?
bit of both, we run some linkedin ads and get referrals
Solid. What happens when someone enquires, you got a process or is it more ad hoc?
honestly its a bit chaotic, leads come in and sometimes we dont get back to them for like 2 days
Yeah with events especially, by the time you reply they've probably already gone with someone else. That response speed is everything
Have you looked into automating that first reply before or is this new territory?

Fair enough. Sounds like the gap is pretty clear though, leads coming in, just nobody catching them fast enough. Before I send you a link to chat with Louis, he's the founder and handles all the strategy calls, anything you want to know first?
Scope based so I can't give a number, but usually under a month of ad spend. 50/50 split so not all upfront. Louis gives you the exact figure once he knows what you'd need

https://calendly.com/markeye/free-discovery-call
Just grab any time that works
